arts.ttl: Why Barcelona star did not join teammates on team bus before Benfica clash
arts.sum: A leading member of the attacking ranks at La Liga giants Barcelona was not part of the travelling party which collectively made its way to the team hotel on Tuesday…

arts.ttl: How FC Barcelona could line-up for Benfica Champions League clash
arts.sum: With a slender 1-0 advantage from the first leg in Lisbon last week, Hansi Flick will field his strongest possible Barça XI this Tuesday at home against Benfica . Barcelona’s game last Saturday against Osasuna was suspended due to the sudden death of club doctor Carles Miñarro and after the UCL test, the Catalan’s face Atletico Madrid on Sunday in LaLiga before the international break.

arts.ttl: La Liga pair eyeing summer deal for Barcelona star
arts.sum: A pair of La Liga clubs are expressing an interest in the signature of a member of the goalkeeper ranks at Barcelona. That’s according to Diario Sport, who point towards…

arts.ttl: Predicted Teams for Barcelona-Benfica: Two key changes, two potential doubts
arts.sum: Barcelona will have to pick themselves up from the tragic passing of team doctor Carles Miñarro Garcia on Saturday, which meant that their game with Osasuna was postponed. They will be back in action at 18:45 CEST against Benfica, as they seek passage to a Champions League quarter-final with a 1-0 lead from the first […] The post Predicted Teams for Barcelona-Benfica: Two key changes, two potential doubts appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Official: Barcelona announce squad to face Benfica
arts.sum: The squad of players called up by La Liga giants Barcelona for the club’s upcoming meeting with Benfica has on Tuesday been unveiled online. Barcelona, of course, are primed to…

This Monday at midday, FC Barcelona has respected a minute's silence in memory of Carles Miñarro, the first team doctor who unexpectedly passed away last Saturday shortly before the game with the ultimately suspended fixture against Osasuna at the Estadi Olímpic Lluís Companys. In the run-up to the Champions League return match against Benfica, Hansi Flick has faced one of the most difficult press conferences since he arrived at Barça and, probably, of his professional career, due to the death of a member of his technical staff, Dr. Carles Miñarro.

arts.ttl: 20-year-old Barcelona talent set for €8m summer exit
arts.sum: Barcelona are set to look at their full-back positions as one of their priorities in order to strengthen their squad in the summer, but it looks as if they will look outside of the club’s La Masia academy in order to do so. arts.ttl: Manchester United out, Barcelona in: Top forward reveals preferences for €65-75m move
arts.sum: Having put in some of the best numbers in European football over the lat two seasons, it looks all but certain that Swedish forward Viktor Gyokeres will be on the move this summer. In the coming weeks, where that move will be will become clearer. arts.ttl: Exclusive: Adidas to Release Benfica 24-25 Fourth Kit
arts.sum: Footy Headlines can exclusively leak that Adidas is set to launch the Benfica fourth shirt for the 2024-25 season.

arts.ttl: No exact date for return to Camp Nou, says Barcelona VP
arts.sum: Elena Fort, FC Barcelona ’s vice president, has admitted that the club does not have an exact return date in mind for the club to go back to playing at Camp Nou. If all goes as planned, Camp Nou could be ready in time for the match against Real Madrid.
